title: Webhooks, Replay Defense, SSRF, Unsafe Consumption, and Business Abuse · Type Recall
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs webhooks, replay defense, ssrf, unsafe consumption, and business abuse from bounded code and request evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the signed ingress, bounded egress, and abuse decision model. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for signed ingress, bounded egress, and abuse decision model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and eviden…
objectives: Verify provider identity, algorithm, exact bytes, timestamp freshness, constant-behavior signature comparison, key rotation, and failure disclosure before parsing.
Deduplicate stable delivery identifiers, persist acceptance atomically, return promptly, process asynchronously, and classify retryable provider responses.
Allowlist scheme and port, canonicalize host, resolve and revalidate every destination, block private or metadata ranges, control redirects, and enforce egress network policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Business Flow Abuse
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 7920 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to combine signed ingress freshness, replay defense, and SSRF egress policy; survive a dependency slowdown without queue growth; then replace an average latency claim with p95 and event-loop saturation evidence. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Model automation-sensitive business operations with actor, cost, inventory, velocity, sequence, idempotency, anomaly, friction, appeal, and recovery evidence.

Inspect the Business Flow Abuse trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Business Flow Abuse.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for model automation-sensitive business operations with actor, cost, inventory, velocity, sequence, idempotency, anomaly, friction, appeal, and recovery evidence. For Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Business Flow Abuse, keep Business Flow Abuse connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
